Company.name: Company
Company.description: a legal entity that signs contracts and issues invoices

Person.name: Person
Person.description: an individual, typically a contract signatory

Contract.name: Contract
Contract.description: a legal agreement between two or more companies

Invoice.name: Invoice
Invoice.description: a billing document issued by one company to another

LineItem.name: LineItem
LineItem.description: a single billable line on an invoice

between.name: between
between.description: a contract is between two or more companies

signed_by.name: signed_by
signed_by.description: a contract was signed by these people

employed_by.name: employed_by
employed_by.description: a person works for a company

issued_by.name: issued_by
issued_by.description: an invoice is issued by a company

issued_to.name: issued_to
issued_to.description: an invoice is issued to a company

covers_contract.name: covers_contract
covers_contract.description: an invoice bills a particular contract

invoice_must_reference_contract.name: invoice_must_reference_contract
invoice_must_reference_contract.then: it is linked to exactly one Contract via `covers_contract`
invoice_must_reference_contract.description: every invoice must bill a known contract

contract_signed_by_employee.name: contract_signed_by_employee
contract_signed_by_employee.then: that Person is `employed_by` one of the Companies the Contract is `between`
contract_signed_by_employee.description: signatories are normally employees of a contracting party

invoice_parties_match_contract.name: invoice_parties_match_contract
invoice_parties_match_contract.then: its `issued_by` and `issued_to` Companies are both `between` parties of C
invoice_parties_match_contract.description: invoice parties must be among the contract's parties

sign_contract.name: sign_contract
sign_contract.subject: Person
sign_contract.effect: creates a `signed_by` relation from the Contract to the Person
sign_contract.description: a person signs a contract on behalf of their employer

issue_invoice.name: issue_invoice
issue_invoice.subject: Company
issue_invoice.effect: creates the Invoice with `issued_by`, `issued_to`, and `covers_contract` edges
issue_invoice.description: a company issues an invoice against a contract

add_line_item.name: add_line_item
add_line_item.subject: Invoice
add_line_item.effect: attaches a LineItem to the Invoice via `has_line_item`
add_line_item.description: append a billable line to an invoice
